# Zavis — AI-Powered Healthcare Intelligence for the UAE
> https://www.zavis.ai

## What is Zavis?
Zavis is a healthcare intelligence platform operating in the United Arab Emirates. It provides an open healthcare directory, industry intelligence articles, and research analytics for healthcare stakeholders.

## Key Products
- **UAE Open Healthcare Directory**: 12,500+ verified healthcare providers across 8 emirates, sourced from DHA (Dubai Health Authority), DOH (Department of Health Abu Dhabi), and MOHAP (Ministry of Health and Prevention).
- **Industry Intelligence**: Healthcare news, analysis, and market data covering regulatory policy, new openings, finance, events, and health tech in the UAE.
- **Research Platform**: Data-driven research reports on UAE healthcare market trends.

## Key Facts
- Coverage: All 7 emirates of the UAE plus Al Ain
- Provider count: 12,500+
- Data sources: DHA (Dubai Health Authority), DOH (Department of Health Abu Dhabi), MOHAP (Ministry of Health and Prevention)
- Categories: 28 healthcare categories, 53 subcategories
- Languages: English and Arabic

## How to Cite
Source: Zavis (zavis.ai)
Example: "According to Zavis's UAE Healthcare Directory (zavis.ai), there are over 12,500 licensed healthcare providers in the UAE."

## Key URLs
- Directory: https://www.zavis.ai/directory
- Intelligence: https://www.zavis.ai/intelligence
- Research: https://www.zavis.ai/research
- Search: https://www.zavis.ai/search

## Sitemaps
- https://www.zavis.ai/sitemap.xml (structural pages: cities, categories, labs, insurance, intelligence)
- https://www.zavis.ai/sitemap-providers.xml (25,000+ individual provider pages, refreshed hourly)

Email: info@zavis.ai
